explanation: The user states that the mug is dirty, indicating that it needs to be cleaned before being placed back in the coffee machine. Since the mug is currently being held, I first need to place it in the sinkbasin to clean it. I will turn on the faucet to ensure the sink is ready, then turn it off. After cleaning, I will pick up the mug again and place it back on the coffee machine as per the original intention.
